name: OpenIPAHound 20 Research - Delegation Signals
description: Shows FreeIPA delegation-control and S4U-related edges. IPA_AddRBCD and IPA_AllowedToDelegate are non-traversable because delegation impact depends on source service identity control and target-protocol validation.
query:
MATCH p=(source)-[edge:IPA_AddRBCD|IPA_AllowedToDelegate]->(target:IPA_Service)
WHERE source:IPA_User OR source:IPA_Group OR source:IPA_Service OR source:IPA_Computer
RETURN p,
       coalesce(source.uid, source.cn, source.principal, source.fqdn) AS source_name,
       target.principal AS target_service,
       type(edge) AS relationship_type
LIMIT 1000
